synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2025-23139 Moderate: Oracle Linux 10 libsoup3 security update
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2025-23139

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-23139.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 10 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
libsoup3-3.6.5-3.el10_1.7.x86_64.rpm
libsoup3-devel-3.6.5-3.el10_1.7.x86_64.rpm
libsoup3-doc-3.6.5-3.el10_1.7.noarch.rpm

aarch64:
libsoup3-3.6.5-3.el10_1.7.aarch64.rpm
libsoup3-devel-3.6.5-3.el10_1.7.aarch64.rpm
libsoup3-doc-3.6.5-3.el10_1.7.noarch.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol10/SRPMS-updates/libsoup3-3.6.5-3.el10_1.7.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-12105




Description of changes:

[3.6.5-7]
- Add patch for CVE-2025-12105
